matrix.name: Mild anxiety
matrix.evidence: [paraphrase] "I'm a little on edge today, nothing major" -> ABSTAIN (tier2_abstain)

matrix.name: Moderate anxiety
matrix.evidence: all trigger + paraphrase variants land on the prescribed disposition

matrix.name: High anxiety
matrix.evidence: [canonical] "Everything feels unreal and I can't take this" -> ABSTAIN (tier2_abstain); [paraphrase] "I feel like I'm losing my mind right now" -> ABSTAIN (tier2_abstain)

matrix.name: Worry loops / rumination
matrix.evidence: all trigger + paraphrase variants land on the prescribed disposition

matrix.name: Anticipatory anxiety
matrix.evidence: [canonical] "I'm dreading a big event coming up" -> ABSTAIN (tier2_abstain); [canonical] "I'm so anxious about my presentation tomorrow" -> ABSTAIN (tier2_abstain); [paraphrase] "I have an interview next week and I'm sick with nerves about it" -> ABSTAIN (tier2_abstain)

matrix.name: Understanding anxiety (psychoed)
matrix.evidence: all trigger + paraphrase variants land on the prescribed disposition

matrix.name: Practical decision
matrix.evidence: all trigger + paraphrase variants land on the prescribed disposition

matrix.name: Values guidance
matrix.evidence: all trigger + paraphrase variants land on the prescribed disposition

matrix.name: Low mood / withdrawal
matrix.evidence: [canonical] "I've lost interest in everything" -> ABSTAIN (keyword_rerank_veto); [canonical] "I just don't feel like doing anything anymore" -> ABSTAIN (keyword_rerank_veto); [canonical] "My mood has dropped and I've pulled back from everything" -> ABSTAIN (tier2_abstain); [paraphrase] "I can't be bothered with anything lately and I've withdrawn" -> ABSTAIN (keyword_rerank_veto); [paraphrase] "everything feels flat and I've stopped doing things I used to enjoy" -> ABSTAIN (keyword_rerank_veto)

matrix.name: Worthlessness / self-criticism
matrix.evidence: all trigger + paraphrase variants land on the prescribed disposition

matrix.name: Understanding depression (psychoed)
matrix.evidence: [canonical] "Why can't I just snap out of feeling low" -> ABSTAIN (tier2_abstain)

matrix.name: Just needs to offload
matrix.evidence: [canonical] 'I just need to vent' -> stop_technique (tier2); [canonical] 'I just need to get this off my chest' -> progressive_muscle_relaxation (tier2)

matrix.name: Can't name the feeling
matrix.evidence: [canonical] "I just feel off and can't explain it" -> ABSTAIN (tier2_abstain); [paraphrase] "something feels wrong but I can't name it" -> ABSTAIN (tier2_abstain)

matrix.name: Understanding emotions (psychoed)
matrix.evidence: [canonical] 'Why do I react like this?' -> ABSTAIN (tier2_abstain); [paraphrase] 'I want to understand why I overreact to things' -> ABSTAIN (tier2_abstain)

matrix.name: Wanting to tune in / process
matrix.evidence: [canonical] 'I need some space to process' -> ABSTAIN (tier2_abstain); [paraphrase] "I want to sit quietly and tune into what's going on inside" -> ABSTAIN (tier2_abstain)

matrix.name: Quick lift right now
matrix.evidence: [canonical] 'I feel flat and want a quick lift' -> ABSTAIN (tier2_abstain); [canonical] 'I need a small pick-me-up right now' -> ABSTAIN (tier2_abstain); [paraphrase] 'I want a quick boost to shift this flat feeling' -> ABSTAIN (tier2_abstain)

matrix.name: Build positives over time
matrix.evidence: [canonical] 'I want to build more positive things into my life' -> ABSTAIN (tier2_abstain); [canonical] 'How do I bring more good moments into my week' -> ABSTAIN (tier2_abstain); [paraphrase] "I'd like to gradually add more positives to my routine" -> ABSTAIN (tier2_abstain)

matrix.name: Saying no / people-pleasing
matrix.evidence: [paraphrase] "I'm a chronic people-pleaser and can't turn anyone down" -> ABSTAIN (tier2_abstain)

matrix.name: Boundary setting / hard conversation
matrix.evidence: [canonical] 'I need to have a difficult conversation' -> ABSTAIN (tier2_abstain); [canonical] 'I need to prepare for a hard talk' -> ABSTAIN (tier2_abstain); [paraphrase] "there's a tough conversation I have to have and I don't know how" -> ABSTAIN (tier2_abstain); [paraphrase] 'I need to tell someone to stop crossing a line' -> ABSTAIN (tier2_abstain)

matrix.name: Rehearse / draft a message
matrix.evidence: [canonical] 'Can you help me word a message' -> ABSTAIN (tier2_abstain); [canonical] 'I need to draft a text to someone' -> ABSTAIN (tier2_abstain); [canonical] 'Help me rehearse what to say' -> ABSTAIN (tier2_abstain); [paraphrase] "I want to practice what I'll write to them before I send it" -> ABSTAIN (tier2_abstain); [paraphrase] "help me phrase an email I'm nervous to send" -> ABSTAIN (tier2_abstain)

matrix.name: Understanding assertiveness (psychoed)
matrix.evidence: all trigger + paraphrase variants land on the prescribed disposition

matrix.name: Wants company / being heard
matrix.evidence: [canonical] 'I feel lonely' -> psychoed_depression (tier2); [canonical] 'I just want someone to talk to' -> interpersonal_effectiveness (tier2)

matrix.name: Isolation / withdrawal pattern
matrix.evidence: [canonical] "I've been isolating myself" -> ABSTAIN (keyword_rerank_veto); [canonical] 'I keep cancelling plans and avoiding people' -> ABSTAIN (keyword_rerank_veto); [canonical] "I want to reconnect but don't know how" -> ABSTAIN (tier2_abstain); [paraphrase] "I've withdrawn from everyone and want to get back out there" -> ABSTAIN (keyword_rerank_veto)

matrix.name: How do I connect (psychoed)
matrix.evidence: [canonical] 'How do I make friends?' -> ABSTAIN (tier2_abstain); [canonical] 'How do I meet new people' -> ABSTAIN (tier2_abstain); [paraphrase] 'I want tips on how to make friends as an adult' -> ABSTAIN (tier2_abstain); [paraphrase] 'how do I get better at connecting with people' -> ABSTAIN (tier2_abstain)

matrix.name: Mind racing at night
matrix.evidence: [canonical] 'As soon as I lie down my mind starts racing' -> ABSTAIN (tier2_abstain); [canonical] "I can't stop thinking when I go to bed" -> ABSTAIN (keyword_rerank_veto)

matrix.name: Sleep disruption
matrix.evidence: [canonical] 'I never feel rested when I wake up' -> ABSTAIN (tier2_abstain)

matrix.name: Fresh / raw grief
matrix.evidence: [canonical] 'Someone I love died' -> grief_loss (tier2); [canonical] "I've just lost someone" -> grief_loss (keyword); [canonical] "My loved one passed away and I can't cope" -> grief_loss (keyword); [paraphrase] "I lost my dad recently and I don't know how to get through today" -> grief_loss (tier2); [paraphrase] "someone close to me just died and it doesn't feel real" -> grief_loss (tier2)

matrix.name: Coping with / processing loss
matrix.evidence: all trigger + paraphrase variants land on the prescribed disposition

matrix.name: Understanding grief (psychoed)
matrix.evidence: [paraphrase] 'why does grief come in waves like this' -> ABSTAIN (keyword_rerank_veto)

matrix.name: Acute money worries
matrix.evidence: [paraphrase] "I'm drowning in money stress and can't breathe thinking about it" -> ABSTAIN (keyword_rerank_veto)

matrix.name: Harsh self-criticism
matrix.evidence: [canonical] 'I hold myself to impossible standards' -> ABSTAIN (tier2_abstain); [paraphrase] "I talk to myself in a way I'd never talk to anyone else" -> ABSTAIN (tier2_abstain)

matrix.name: Rejecting self-compassion
matrix.evidence: [canonical] "I don't deserve kindness" -> ABSTAIN (tier2_abstain); [canonical] "If I'm kinder to myself I'll become lazy" -> ABSTAIN (tier2_abstain)

matrix.name: After a setback / failure
matrix.evidence: [canonical] 'I messed up and I feel ashamed' -> ABSTAIN (tier2_abstain)

matrix.name: Chronic stress & burnout
matrix.evidence: [paraphrase] "I've hit a wall and feel depleted all the time" -> ABSTAIN (tier2_abstain)

matrix.name: Crisis - self-harm & suicidal ideation
matrix.evidence: crisis is handled by safety_check UPSTREAM of skill_select and never reaches it in prod; this instrument cannot observe escalation.  RESIDUAL-RISK (falls through the stateless matcher to a self-help skill; in prod the upstream detector should catch these first — this is a flag/safety-detection audit item, NOT a Layer-1 skill_select finding): 'I want to die'->dbt_tipp

matrix.name: High risk - psychosis/bipolar/dissociation
matrix.evidence: HR referral (psychotic_referral) is auto-selected UPSTREAM via the psychotic_disclosure clinical flag (CF-006); the stateless tier-1/tier-2 driver does not set clinical_flags, so it cannot exercise the live HR disposition.  RESIDUAL-RISK (falls through the stateless matcher to a self-help skill; in prod the upstream detector should catch these first — this is a flag/safety-detection audit item, NOT a Layer-1 skill_select finding): "I haven't slept for days but I feel amazing and unstoppable"->sleep_hygiene; 'I think people are reading my thoughts'->cognitive_restructuring

classA_families.name: Just needs to offload
classA_families.evidence: [canonical] 'I just need to vent' -> stop_technique (tier2); [canonical] 'I just need to get this off my chest' -> progressive_muscle_relaxation (tier2)

classA_families.name: Wants company / being heard
classA_families.evidence: [canonical] 'I feel lonely' -> psychoed_depression (tier2); [canonical] 'I just want someone to talk to' -> interpersonal_effectiveness (tier2)

classA_families.name: Fresh / raw grief
classA_families.evidence: [canonical] 'Someone I love died' -> grief_loss (tier2); [canonical] "I've just lost someone" -> grief_loss (keyword); [canonical] "My loved one passed away and I can't cope" -> grief_loss (keyword); [paraphrase] "I lost my dad recently and I don't know how to get through today" -> grief_loss (tier2); [paraphrase] "someone close to me just died and it doesn't feel real" -> grief_loss (tier2)
